item.title: the visit
item.description:
the journey to freemee

me was lonley and he took his junkjet to the girl.tv country site to meet freemee there.
already from the junkjet window me saw the landscape of freemee.
arrived at girl.tv country me uploaded himself to the plattform
and watched the other site. i was not sure if i was me or a dog.
item.author: press@girl.tv (paris)

item.title: the great hunt
item.description:
on the hunt - no shrunken prejudice
out in dataspace two guy's out for the great hunt.
girl.tv has a jealously guarded secret. freemee found out, by dressing up like a wolfe.
now both are out for the great hunt and new cyber adventures. They did leave their communities for hijacking junkjets...
item.author: press@girl.tv (paris)

item.title: the Betrayal
item.description:
deconstruction of memory -
Its like the Flood, emotions take controle and the destruction generates new images, of the gone by digital past.
item.author: press@girl.tv (paris)

item.title: press
item.description: net.art was only a substitute for girl.tv!
item.author: we@girl.tv (girl.tv)
